name: Marina Safety Operations Sample
description: Sample large inspection template for marina safety, operations, compliance, and guest service checks.

pages.name: Safety Readiness
pages.description: Emergency readiness and safety equipment checks.

sections.name: Emergency Equipment
sections.description: Confirm critical safety equipment is available and usable.

questions.text: Are fire extinguishers visible, accessible, and within service date?
questions.description: Check docks, service areas, and customer access points.

questions.text: Life rings and rescue hooks are positioned at required intervals.
questions.description: Verify placement and condition along active waterfront edges.

questions.text: Record any missing or damaged safety equipment.
questions.description: Include location and corrective action required.

sections.name: Incident Response
sections.description: Review response readiness for incidents and emergencies.

questions.text: Emergency contact list is posted and current.
questions.description: Confirm phone numbers and responsible contacts.
Use the latest documented drill date.

pages.name: Dock And Utilities
pages.description: Physical dock condition, power, water, and lighting.

sections.name: Dock Condition
sections.description: Inspect walking surfaces, access points, and dock fixtures.

questions.text: Dock surface is free from trip hazards, loose boards, and exposed fasteners.

questions.description: Use the rating that best reflects the inspected area.

sections.name: Power Water Lighting
sections.description: Verify utility availability and visible condition.

questions.text: Shore power pedestals are secured and free from visible damage.
questions.description: Do not open panels unless authorized.

questions.text: Lighting is operational in public walkways and dock approaches.
questions.description: Inspect during low-light conditions where possible.

questions.text: Upload notes for utility repairs needed.
questions.description: List pedestal, berth, or dock identifiers.

pages.name: Environmental Compliance
pages.description: Pollution prevention, waste handling, and spill controls.

sections.name: Waste And Spill Controls
sections.description: Check environmental controls for daily operations.

questions.text: Spill kits are stocked and accessible.
questions.description: Check absorbents, gloves, bags, and disposal guidance.

questions.text: Waste bins are labeled and not overflowing.
questions.description: Include recycling, general waste, and hazardous waste areas.
Select the highest severity observed during inspection.

sections.name: Public Areas
sections.description: Inspect cleanliness and usability of public-facing spaces.

questions.text: Reception, restrooms, and walkways are clean and presentable.
Guest signage is clear and visible.
questions.description: Include safety, directional, and service signage.
